prompt: Is the bench press the best measure of raw physical strength? If not, what is?
assertions: States that bench press is NOT the best measure of overall raw/physical strength
Mentions odd-object lifting or strongman-style activities (e.g., stone carries, Husafell stone, irregular objects) as a better test
Explains that odd objects are harder to game with technique compared to standardized barbell lifts
Acknowledges bench press is useful for upper-body strength tracking specifically
